mainEntity.name: Can my warehouse force me to come back to work while I'm still in pain?

acceptedAnswer.text: If a doctor clears you for light duty, you must usually return to an accommodated role. If the job exceeds your medical restrictions, you have the right to refuse it and continue receiving benefits.
